tasks.title: Integration Testing Implementation

tasks.title: Production Deployment Preparation

Configure environment variables in GCP Secret Manager
Set up monitoring and alerting for new endpoints

dependencies: SEC-001 must be completed before BACK-001
BACK-001 must be completed before FRONT-001
FRONT-001 must be completed before QA-001
All tasks must be completed before DEVOPS-001
